title: ACF CPT / Taxonomy permalink rewrite
description: Permalink rewrite configuration for ACF CPT and Taxonomy JSON. Numeric flags (with_front, feeds, pages) are STRING-ENCODED ("0"/"1") because ACF Pro's Admin Sync UI serialises booleans as strings — modelling them as booleans here would break round-trip.

permalink_rewrite.description: Rewrite strategy. no_permalink = no rewrite; post_type_key / taxonomy_key = use the post-type / taxonomy key as the slug (WP default); custom_permalink = use the `slug` field below. ACF uses post_type_key for CPTs and taxonomy_key for taxonomies.

slug.description: The URL prefix when permalink_rewrite is custom_permalink. ACF appends /%postname%/ automatically — do not include it here.

with_front.description: String-encoded boolean. ACF Pro serialises as '0' or '1'.

rewrite_hierarchical.description: String-encoded boolean — taxonomy rewrite option (ACF taxonomy JSON).
